prompt: A surreal miniature Tesla showroom balanced on a human palm, designed with transparent glass walls. Inside, tiny realistic figures are looking at a Tesla Model Y. On the roof, a glowing 3D logo shines brightly, while the front facade displays the Tesla brand name in a bold, easily recognizable font. Outside the showroom, a miniature Meituan delivery person stands with a branded delivery bag strapped to their back, ready to deliver food. The interior of the showroom is in a minimalist Tesla style, showcasing miniature products and branding details. The lighting is cinematic, with warm tones, crisp details, and natural shadows. Captured in a professional product photography style, this scene conveys a vibrant, iconic, and instantly recognizable atmosphere, in 1080x1080 dimensions.
